# @json-express/queue-bullmq — AI Context

Distributed task queue on BullMQ + Redis: durable jobs, delays, cron repeats, worker processes.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/queue-bullmq
```
Discovery is automatic; with queue-memory also installed choose `jex.queue=@json-express/queue-bullmq`. **Never import BullMQ or configure Redis in application logic.**

## Configuration (.env — case-insensitive)
| Key | Required | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.queue-bullmq.connectionString` | yes — boot fails loudly without it | Redis URI |

## What it unlocks
- `ctx.queue.enqueue(queueName, jobName, payload, { delay?, cron? })` in model hooks and custom endpoints — `cron` creates repeatable jobs.
- Jobs survive restarts; workers auto-log failures with job context.
